summary: Tested removal of all European university references from CourtBound. Found and fixed one critical bug: CollegesPage.js still referenced removed 'region' state variable causing runtime crash. All other European removal checks passed.

ui_bugs.issue: Line 56 still referenced 'region' variable after state removal, causing 'region is not defined' ReferenceError and crashing the Colleges page

critical_code_review_comments: CollegesPage.js line 56 had leftover 'if (region) ...' filter after region state was removed - caused page crash. Fixed by removing that line.

CollegeDetailPage.js line 331: text says 'European players' inside a foreign_friendly block - this is minor and contextually describes European players recruiting into USA colleges, not a European college reference
test_credentials: player@test.com / test1234 (needed to be registered first - not pre-seeded in Supabase). Admin: admin@courtbound.com / admin123
seed_data_creation: Registered player@test.com via /api/auth/register as it didn't exist in Supabase
context_for_next_testing_agent: European college removal is complete and working. One bug was fixed: CollegesPage applyFilters() had leftover 'region' reference. API returns 230 USA colleges, 0 European. Admin panel has no European toggles. Help widget has no European FAQ. Dashboard subtitle shows Men's/Women's correctly.

test_results.api_europe_filter: PASS - /api/colleges returns 0 European colleges (230 USA only)
test_results.colleges_page_no_toggle: PASS - No Europe region toggle visible
test_results.colleges_page_no_europe: PASS - No European colleges in list
test_results.college_detail_no_euro_tips: PASS - No 'Tips for Contacting European Clubs' section
test_results.dashboard_subtitle: PASS - Code verified: shows 'Men's | Basketball Scholarship Tracker'
test_results.help_widget_no_euro_faq: PASS - No European university FAQ item
test_results.admin_no_euro_toggle: PASS - No 'European Colleges' feature flag in admin panel
